questions.question: Double entry principle: every entry has
questions.explanation: Every transaction affects at least two accounts.

questions.question: Capital expenditure creates
questions.explanation: Capital expenditure results in an asset.

questions.question: Trial balance detects
questions.explanation: Trial balance detects arithmetical errors in ledger balances.

questions.question: Contra entry is used in
questions.explanation: Contra entries appear in cash book between cash and bank columns.

questions.question: Bad debts are treated as
questions.explanation: Bad debts are an expense to the business.

questions.question: Provision for doubtful debts is shown as
questions.explanation: It is a contra asset reducing receivables.

questions.question: FIFO stands for
questions.explanation: FIFO is First In First Out.

questions.question: Current ratio formula
questions.explanation: Current ratio = Current Assets / Current Liabilities.
